description_long: This object is a long, double-edged sword with a straight, tapered blade that appears to be forged from a dark, metallic material. The blade is slender and symmetrical, with a pointed tip and subtle ridges running along its length, giving it a refined and menacing appearance. The crossguard is elegantly shaped, extending horizontally with slight curves at the ends, providing both protection and a decorative touch. The handle is cylindrical and textured, likely designed for a secure grip, and ends in a rounded pommel that balances the sword. The entire object has a uniform, dark coloration, suggesting it is made from a single type of metal or finished with a dark coating. There are no visible engravings, jewels, or other decorative elements, giving the sword a sleek and utilitarian look.
description: A long, dark, double-edged sword with a straight, pointed blade, elegant crossguard, and textured cylindrical handle. The design is sleek and functional, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight, double-edged blade, crossguard, and handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and the cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slimness of the blade and the handle's profile.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, textured, dark metal, rounded pommel
